items.title: Org Graph API Endpoint
items.description: Implement GET /api/v5/org-graph — reads .agentforge/agents/*.yaml + delegation.yaml, returns {nodes, edges}. Dashboard already calls this URL.

items.title: Cross-Workspace Learning
items.description: EmbeddingStore.indexSession() helper auto-indexes session outcomes (task + response text). POST /api/v5/embeddings/learn-session endpoint wires AgentRuntime results into the embedding index.

items.title: Agent Self-Improvement Loop
items.description: SelfProposalEngine.fromSessions(sessions) reads recent session outcomes and auto-proposes sprint items. POST /api/v5/proposals/from-sessions endpoint triggers generation.

items.title: Cost Telemetry Summary
items.description: GET /api/v5/costs/summary returns per-model totals, daily rollups, and token breakdown. Dashboard cost page updated with summary stat cards.

items.title: Integration Test Expansion
items.description: Expand tests/v5/server-integration.test.ts to cover org-graph, proposals/from-sessions, costs/summary, embeddings/learn-session, agents list.

items.title: v5.2 Release
items.description: Bump package.json + plugin.json to 5.2.0, mark sprint complete, write retro.
